plan.name: AI Habit Tracker
plan.target_audience: individuals looking to improve their daily habits and routines
features: Habit tracking with customizable goals and reminders
AI-powered insights and recommendations for habit improvement
Personalized habit coaching with machine learning algorithms
Integration with popular calendar and fitness apps
Social sharing and community features for motivation and support
plan.monetization: freemium model with in-app purchases and subscription-based premium features

suggestions: Add type definitions for state variables

features: habit tracking

reminders and notifications

issues: Missing import statements for HabitTracker, Insights, GoalSetting, Reminders, and ProgressAnalytics components
Supabase credentials are hardcoded in the db library
No error handling for Supabase queries
No loading state for data fetching
suggestions: Add import statements for missing components
Use environment variables for Supabase credentials
Implement error handling for Supabase queries
Add loading state for data fetching
Consider adding type annotations for component props
